fairness_repairs: Changed ELMRec descriptor to high-order interaction-aware LLM recommendation.
Changed IRLLRec descriptor to intent representation learning with LLMs.
Changed ProEx descriptor to profile extrapolation with LLMs.
Changed ProMax descriptor to LLM-derived profiles with distribution shaping.
Changed RLMRec descriptor to representation learning with LLMs; removed the incorrect reinforcement-learning wording.
bibtex_repairs: Added arXiv eprint/DOI fields for Lin et al. while keeping TMLR as a note to avoid ACM BibTeX volume/page warnings.
external_spot_checks: ProEx metadata checked against ACM DOI 10.1145/3770854.3780284.
RLMRec metadata checked against ACM DOI 10.1145/3589334.3645458.
ELMRec metadata checked against ACL Anthology 2024.emnlp-main.653.
Lin et al. metadata checked against OpenReview/TMLR plus arXiv 2205.14334.
remaining_cautions: ProEx and ProMax are 2026 entries; re-check proceedings metadata immediately before final submission.
Citation spot-check does not replace section-level top-conference review.
